title: Deleting Apps
drDigitalIntro: Delete apps you no longer use to free up storage space. When you delete an app, the app itself is removed, but your data (like game saves or documents) may be stored in the cloud and restored if you reinstall. You can always reinstall a free app at no cost. Paid apps can also be reinstalled for free if you bought them from the same account.

playgroundTask.goal: You deleted an app you no longer need

steps.say: Go to My Apps to see your installed apps.
Find Puzzle Quest and click the Delete button next to it.

drDigitalSuccess: You deleted an app! You can always reinstall it for free from the store later.
drDigitalHint: Go to My Apps, find the app you want to remove, and click the Delete (trash) button.
